name: jowork-monorepo
description: Jowork — open-source AI coworker platform (monorepo root)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @jowork/core build && pnpm --filter @jowork/premium build && pnpm --filter @jowork/app build && pnpm --filter @jowork/app-fluxvita build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @jowork/core lint && pnpm --filter @jowork/core build && pnpm --filter @jowork/premium lint && pnpm --filter @jowork/premium build && pnpm --filter @jowork/app lint && pnpm --filter @jowork/app-fluxvita lint
